title: condylocarpus humilis
intro: Condylocarpus humilis, also known as the dwarf conifer, is a small to medium-sized coniferous plant that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various ailments. The health benefits of Condylocarpus humilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and bark can also be used to make herbal preparations, such as tinctures and essential oils, for topical applications.
